sections.paragraph:
Original: יראה

Transliteration: yir'âh

Phonetic: yir-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. fear, terror, fearing
    1. fear, terror
    2. awesome or terrifying thing (object causing fear)
    3. fear (of God), respect, reverence, piety
    4. revered

Origin: from H3373

TWOT entry: 907b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
